name: assign_user
description: Assigns a user to a support queue by user ID and queue ID. Returns assignment confirmation with timestamp.

name: get_user
description: Retrieves user profile information by user ID. Returns name, email, and status.

name: create_ticket
description: Creates a new support ticket with a title and priority level. Returns the generated ticket ID.

name: update_status
description: Updates the status of a ticket or task by reference ID. Use statuses like open, in_progress, or done.
